title: Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange Protocol
description: A visual flowchart explaining the step-by-step process of how two parties establish a shared secret key over an insecure channel without ever transmitting the key itself.
relationships: Alice generates her public key A = g^a mod p and sends it to Bob
Bob generates his public key B = g^b mod p and sends it to Alice
Alice computes the shared secret s = B^a mod p
Bob computes the shared secret s = A^b mod p
Both parties now possess the same shared secret key for encryption
